Get consumption
query:
SELECT
    slave_id,
    avg_value,
    TO_CHAR(period, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"') AS period
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value,
        time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS period
    FROM consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{msg.payload.id}})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.payload.start}}' AND '{{msg.payload.end}}'
    GROUP BY
        slave_id,
        period
) bucketed
ORDER BY period DESC

rules.to: (	      $rule := $lookup(rules, current.rule);	      {	          current.rule: (	              $ids := $split(current.id, ',');	              $grouped := $reduce(payload, function($acc, $va) {	                  (	                      $key := $string($va.slave_id);	                      $prev := $lookup($acc, $key);	                      $merge([$acc, {$key: $append($prev, $va.avg_value * $rule.keyMulti)}])	                  )	              }, {});	              $map($ids, function($v) {	                  (	                      $old:=$lookup($lookup(data, current.rule),$lookup($rule.slaves, $trim($v)).cloud_id);	                      $id_num := $number($trim($v));	                      $raw := $lookup($grouped, $string($id_num));	                      $values := $type($raw) = "array" ? $raw : $type($raw) = "number" ? [$raw] : [];	                      (	                      $value:=$count($values) > 0 ? (	                                  $rule.aggregation = "AVG" ? $average($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MIN" ? $min($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MAX" ? $max($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "SUM" ? $sum($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "COUNT" ? $count($values) :	                                  $values[0]	                              ) : "No data";	                      	                        $mytrig:=$type($value)="number"?	                                    (	                                      ($rule.operator = "GT" and $value > $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "GTE" and $value >= $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "LT" and $value < $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "LTE" and $value <= $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "EQ" and $value = $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "NEQ" and $value != $rule.value) or	                                      (	                                      $valeH:= $type($rule.valueHigh) = "number"?	                                          $rule.valueHigh	                                          :	                                          0;	                                      ($rule.operator = "BETWEEN" and ($value >= $rule.value and $value <= $valeH)) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "OUTSIDE" and ($value < $rule.value or $value > $valeH))	                                      )	                                    )	                                    :	                                    (	                                        $type($old.triggered) = "boolean" ?	                                        $old.triggered :	                                        false	                                    ) ;	                          {	                              $lookup($rule.slaves, $trim($v)).cloud_id: {	                                  "triggered": $mytrig,	                                  "local_id": $trim($v),	                                  "time": $old.triggered = $mytrig?	                                    $old.time :	                                    $now(),	                                  "status": $lookup(slaves, $trim($v)),	                                  "value": $type($value) = "number"?	                                  $round($value,2) :	                                  $value	                              }	                          }	                      	                      )	                  )	              }) ~> $merge()	          )	      }	  )

rules.to: (	      $now_ms := $millis();	      $sid := $string(payload.id);		      $calcValue :=	          (	              $current := filter.deviceName;	              filter.water ?	                  (	                      $parts := $split($current, ' ');	                      $start := $number($parts[2]);	                      $heigh := $number($parts[3]);	                      $multi := $number($substringAfter($parts[4], 'x'));	                      $type($start) = 'number' and $type($heigh) = 'number' and $type($multi) = 'number' ?	                          $round((payload.value - $start + filter.offset.water_level) * $multi / $heigh, 2 )	                      :	                          0	                     	                  )	              :	                  payload.value + filter.offset.pot	          )	      ;		          {	              "pot_"&$sid: 	                  {	                        "value": $calcValue,	                        "time":$now(),	                        "local_id":$sid,	                        "type": 'pot'	                  }	              	          }	  )

(		$now_ms := $millis();	$now_str := $now();	$today := $string($number($now('[F1]','-0300'))%7);		$inTimeRange := function($startAt, $endAt, $time){	  (	      $ls := $number($substringBefore($startAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($startAt,':'));	      $le := $number($substringBefore($endAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($endAt,':'));	      $le > $ls ?	          $time >= $ls and ($le = 1439 or $time < $le)	      :	          $time >= $ls or $time < $le	  )	};				[$each(rules, function($v,$k){	(	$metric := 	$contains($v.metric, 'emperat') ? "temp" :	(($contains($v.metric, 'nstant') and $contains($v.metric, 'ower')) or	($contains($v.metric, 'ater') and $contains($v.metric, 'ont'))) ? "pot" :	$contains($v.metric, 'umid') ? "humid" : false;		    $v.aggregation != "LAST" and	    $metric != false ?	    (	        	        $aux:=$lookup(var, $k);	        $cond:= $type(var) = "object"?	                    $type($aux) = "object"	                :	                    false;	                	        {$k:	            [$each($v.slaves, function($va,$ka){	                (	                $old:= $cond ?	                    $lookup($aux, $ka);	                $filtered_old:=[$each($old, function($vb,$kb){	                    $now_ms - $toMillis($kb) < $v.duration or $v.duration=0 ?	                    {$kb:$vb}	                })]~>$merge();	                $new:=$lookup(payload, $metric&"_"&$ka);	                	                {	                    $ka: 	                    $merge([	                    (	                        $type($old) = "object"?	                            $filtered_old	                        :	                            {}	                    ),	                    ($type($new) = "object" ?	                    (	                    $utctime:= $fromMillis($toMillis($new.time)- 10800000);	                    $H:= $number($substring($substringAfter($utctime,'T'),0,2));	                    $M:= $number($substring($substringAfter($utctime,':'),0,2));	                    $T:= $H*60+$M;	                        $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt, $T) and	                        $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today)?	                            {$new.time:$new.value}	                        :	                            {}	                    ) : {}	                    )	                    ])	                }	                	                )	            })]~>$merge()	        }	    )	)	})]~>$merge()		)

$merge([$each(payload.data.deviceIndex, function($v,$k){ 	        $type($v.slaveId) = "number"?	        {	            "sl_"&$v.slaveId:$merge([$v,	                	                    $reduce($v.ruleIds, function($acc,$va){	                        (	                        $aux:=$lookup(payload.data.rules, $va);	                        $cond:=$type($va) = "string" and $type($aux.metric) = 'string';	                        {	                            "cloud_ID":$k,	                            "ruleIds": 	                            $merge([$acc.ruleIds,	                                (	                                $type($va) = "string"?	                                    {$va:true}	                                :	                                    {$va.id:true}	                                )	                            ]),	                            "pot": $acc.pot or 	                            (	                            $cond ?	                                    ($contains($aux.metric, 'nstant') and $contains($aux.metric, 'ower'))	                            ),	                            "temp": $acc.temp or 	                            (	                            $cond ? (	$now_ms := $millis();	$now_str := $now();	$today := $string($number($now('[F1]','-0300'))%7);	$time := $number($now('[H]','-0300'))*60+$number($now('[m]','-0300'));		$inTimeRange := function($startAt, $endAt){	  (	      $ls := $number($substringBefore($startAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($startAt,':'));	      $le := $number($substringBefore($endAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($endAt,':'));	      $le > $ls ?	          $time >= $ls and ($le = 1439 or $time < $le)	      :	          $time >= $ls or $time < $le	  )	};		[$each(rules, function($v,$k){	    (	      	    ($v.aggregation = 'LAST' or 	    ($contains($v.metric, 'ater') and $contains($v.metric, 'low'))	    )	    and	    $contains($v.metric,'nerg') = false and	    $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today) and	    $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt)?	        {$k:$v}	    )	})]~>$merge()	)

(	$now_ms := $millis();	$now_str := $now();	$today := $string($number($now('[F1]','-0300'))%7);	$time := $number($now('[H]','-0300'))*60+$number($now('[m]','-0300'));		$inTimeRange := function($startAt, $endAt){	  (	      $ls := $number($substringBefore($startAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($startAt,':'));	      $le := $number($substringBefore($endAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($endAt,':'));	      $le > $ls ?	          $time >= $ls and ($le = 1439 or $time < $le)	      :	          $time >= $ls or $time < $le	  )	};		[$each(rules, function($v,$k){	    $v.aggregation != 'LAST' and	    ($contains($v.metric, 'ater') and $contains($v.metric, 'low')) = false and	    $contains($v.metric,'nerg') = false and	    $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today) and	    $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt)?	        {$k:$v}	})]~>$merge()	)

(	$now_ms := $millis();		$checkOp := function($op, $val, $threshold, $high){	  ($op = "GT" and $val > $threshold) or	  ($op = "GTE" and $val >= $threshold) or	  ($op = "LT" and $val < $threshold) or	  ($op = "LTE" and $val <= $threshold) or	  ($op = "EQ" and $val = $threshold) or	  ($op = "NEQ" and $val != $threshold) or	  ($op = "BETWEEN" and ($val >= $threshold and $val <= $high)) or	  ($op = "OUTSIDE" and ($val < $threshold or $val > $high))	};		[$each(rules, function($v,$k){	    (	    $metric := 	          $contains($v.metric, 'emperat') ? "pot" :	          ($contains($v.metric, 'ater') and $contains($v.metric, 'low')) ? "water" :	          $contains($v.metric, 'umid') ? "humid" : "ch";	          	    {	        $k: $each( $v.slaves, function($va,$ka){	            (	            $slave:=$lookup(slaves, 'sl_'&$ka);	            $var:=$lookup($slave, $metric&'_value');	            $have:=$type($var) = "object";	            $time:= $now_ms - $toMillis($var.time) < $v.duration;	            $value:= $have ?	                        $time?	                            $var.value	                        :	                            "Out of rule range"	                    :	                        "Undefined";	            $valeH:=$type($v.valueHigh) = "number" ? $v.valueHigh : 0;	            	            {	                $va.cloud_id: {	                    "local_id": $ka,	                    "status": $slave.status,	                    "alldata": $have ?	                        {	                            $string($toMillis($var.time)):$var.value	                        },	                    "value": $value,	                    "triggered": $type($value) = "string"?	                        false	                    :	                        $type($value) = "number"?	                            $checkOp($v.operator, $value, $v.value, $valeH)	                        :	                            $type($va.channel) = 'number'?	                                (	                                $aux:=$lookup($value[$va.channel], (	                                    $contains($lookup($v.metric), 'ensor')?	                                        'input'	                                    :	                                        'output'	                                ) );	                                $contains($lookup($v.metric), 'oor')?	                                    $aux=0	                                    :	                                    $aux>0	                                )	                            :	                                false	                            	                }	            }	            )	        })	    }	    )	})]~>$merge()	)

(	      $checkOp := function($op, $val, $threshold, $high){	          ($op = "GT" and $val > $threshold) or	          ($op = "GTE" and $val >= $threshold) or	          ($op = "LT" and $val < $threshold) or	          ($op = "LTE" and $val <= $threshold) or	          ($op = "EQ" and $val = $threshold) or	          ($op = "NEQ" and $val != $threshold) or	          ($op = "BETWEEN" and ($val >= $threshold and $val <= $high)) or	          ($op = "OUTSIDE" and ($val < $threshold or $val > $high))	      };		      $aggregate := function($agg, $vals){	          $agg = "AVG" ? $average($vals) :	          $agg = "MIN" ? $min($vals) :	          $agg = "MAX" ? $max($vals) :	          $agg = "SUM" ? $sum($vals) :	          $agg = "COUNT" ? $count($vals) :	          $vals[0]	      };		      [$each(rules, function($v, $k){	          (	              $oldruledata := $lookup(data, $k);	              $valeH := $type($v.valueHigh) = "number" ? $v.valueHigh : 0;	              $newruledata := $lookup(var, $k);	              (	                  {	                      $k: [$each($v.slaves, function($va, $ka){	                          (	                              $slave := $lookup(slaves, 'sl_'&$ka);	                              $old := $lookup($oldruledata, $va.cloud_id);	                              $oldtrigger:= $type($old.triggered) = "boolean" ?	                                $old.triggered : "Undefined";	                              $slaveStatus := $type($lookup($slave, "status")) = "string" ?	                                  $lookup($slave, "status") : "Undefined";	                              $new := $lookup($newruledata, $ka);	                              $value := $aggregate($v.aggregation, $new.*);	                              $newtrigger:= $type($value) = "number" ?	                                $checkOp($v.operator, $value, $v.value, $valeH)	                                :	                                "Undefined";		                              {	                                $va.cloud_id:	                                {	                                    "value":$type($value) = "number"?	                                        $round($value,2) : "Undefined",	                                    "local_id":$ka,	                                    "status": $slaveStatus,	                                    "triggered": $type($newtrigger) = "boolean"?	                                        $newtrigger :	                                        $type($oldtrigger) = "boolean" ?	                                        $oldtrigger : false,	                                    "time": $type($oldtrigger) = "boolean"?	                                        ($oldtrigger = $newtrigger and $type($old.time) = "string"?	                                            $old.time :	                                            $now()	                                        ) :	                                        $now(),	                                    "alldata": $new 	                                }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	                  }	              )	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

$type($p) = "object" and $p.triggered = false and $type($p.time) = "string" ?	                  $p.time	              :	              (	                  $d := $lookup($lookup(data, $ruleKey),  )	          )	      };		      [$each(rules, function($v, $k){	          (	              $active := $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today) and $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt);	              $exist := $lookup(payload, $k);		              {	                  $k: $active and $type($exist) = "object" ?	                      $exist	                  :	                      [$each($v.slaves, $va.cloud_id: {	                                      "triggered": false,	                                      "value": "Out of Rule Range",	                                      "values": [],	                                      "alldata": [],	                                      "time": $preserveTime($k, $va.cloud_id),	                                      "local_id": $ka,	                                      "status": $type($status) = "string" ? $status : "offline"	                                  }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	              }	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

name: Get channels
Get channels
query:
SELECT slave_id
FROM channels
WHERE name ILIKE '%idr%'
AND slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})

name: Get water
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM Channel_pulse_log

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.pot3f}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.potsw}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get temp
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    AVG(value) AS media_value
FROM temperature_history

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.temp}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;
